spotlight.title: Monthly Gyarwee Shareef
spotlight.description: Monthly Gyarwee Shareef commemorating Imam Rabbani Mujaddid al-Alf al-Thani, Shaykh Ahmad Faruqi Sirhindi, and Imam Ahmad Raza Khan, with Mawlana Muhammad Irfan Naqshbandi and Mawlana Hafiz Faizan Raza.
spotlight.location: GMT Ghousia Masjid, 56 Camrose Street, SE2 0JA

notificationBar.linkText: Monthly Gyarwee Shareef — Saturday 18th July, from Asr
